name: Find Sonic?
desc:
Oh no! Sonic, the most famous hedgehog in gaming, got himself in yet another mess!

This time, he got lost while driving a car (as seen in Sonic Drift 2) and Waze sent him towards a cliff! :(

Find him in the Skull Room and inform his spirit of your arrival.

He shall return to the physical world not too long after.

Are you up [b]2[/b] it?
